hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git (commit|add -A|add \.)"; then IGNORED=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -E "^[MADRCU]" | cut -c4- | while read f; do git check-ignore -q "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo "$f"; done); if [ -n "$IGNORED" ]; then echo "{\"continue\":false,\"stopReason\":\"BLOCKED: Các file sau nằm trong .gitignore: $IGNORED\"}"; exit 0; fi; fi'
